# Copilot Instructions for gnurken.com

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Overview

This is a Next.js React application for gnurken.com built with:

- Next.js 15.4.3 with App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4
- ESLint
- Turbopack for fast development

## Development Guidelines

- Use TypeScript for all new components and pages
- Follow Next.js App Router conventions
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- Maintain responsive design patterns
- Follow React best practices and hooks patterns
- Use ESLint rules for code quality

## Project Structure

- `src/app/` - App Router pages and layouts
- `src/components/` - Reusable React components (create as needed)
- `public/` - Static assets
- Root config files for Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, and ESLint

## Coding Standards

- Use functional components with hooks
- Implement proper TypeScript typing
- Follow semantic HTML practices
- Use Tailwind utility classes for styling
- Optimize images using Next.js Image component
- Follow accessibility best practices
